global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with a central focus on a dinner offer.
global.main_message: Quick and affordable dinner options available.

elements.label: Green background
elements.description: A vibrant green background fills the canvas, providing a lively and fresh atmosphere.

elements.label: PlateSprint logo
elements.description: The logo features the text 'PlateSprint' in a bold, modern font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Dinner offer
elements.description: A visually appealing representation of a dinner plate with a fork and knife, centered in the ad.

elements.label: Dinner in minutes
elements.description: The phrase 'Dinner in minutes' is displayed prominently in a large, clear font, conveying the main offer.

elements.label: Price tag
elements.description: The price '€9.99' is highlighted in a bold font, emphasizing the affordability of the meal.

elements.label: Shop now button
elements.description: A bright button with the text 'Shop now' invites users to take action, located at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: PlateSprint logo
elements.description: The logo 'PlateSprint' appears at the top, designed in a modern style to attract attention.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small badge with the word 'SALE' in bold letters, positioned at the top right corner to indicate a promotion.
